basic_details.job_title: NILERD – Joint Director, Deputy and Assistant Director – 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Labour Economics Research and Development (NILERD) has released a notification for the recruitment of 13 Joint Director, Deputy and Assistant Director Posts. Eligible candidates with a M.Com, M.Sc, M.Tech/M.E, MBA, M.Acan apply. within 45 days from the date of publication in Employment News. Candidates must submit their applications via email before the deadline.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: within 45 days from the date of publication in Employment News

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years (not exceeding 50 years for contract, not exceeding 56 years for deputation)

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Economics, Development Studies, Statistics, Engineering/Technology, Business Management, Public Policy or Social Sciences, Post-Master’s experience in research/teaching at supervisory level, High-quality publications in peer-reviewed journals/edited books, Desirable: Ph.D., consultancy/project experience, econometric software skills

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NILERD Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: NILERD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Joint Director, Deputy and Assistant Director Posts
